name: page1_button_event_minimal
verified_behavior: get p1title.txt returns PAGE1 before the click
get back0.txt returns BACK before the click
click back0,1 then click back0,0 triggers the button release event
sendme returns 1 after the click, proving the event jumped to 0.pa/page0
get back0.txt returns invalid_reference after the jump
get page0.bco returns 65535 after the jump
notes: The page1 event compiler remains experimental and is only validated for one normal button with one release event.
The validated jump command is numeric page 1, because page0 is runtime page id 1 in the recovered case31 layout.
